TextView.android:text:
Meditation Practices

1. Breathing Meditation
Focus on slow, deep breaths for 5–10 minutes.

2. Body Scan
Slowly relax each part of your body from head to toe.

3. Guided Meditation
Follow an audio or video guide to stay focused.

4. Mindfulness Meditation
Stay present and observe your thoughts without judgment.

5. Visualization
Imagine a peaceful place to calm your mind.

6. Loving-Kindness Meditation
Send positive thoughts to yourself and others.

7. Mantra Meditation
Repeat a calming word or phrase silently.

8. Walking Meditation
Focus on each step and your surroundings mindfully.

9. Journaling After Meditation
Write down thoughts and feelings post-session.

10. Consistency is Key
Meditate daily even if only for 5 minutes.
